landmarks.name: Main Entrance Gate
landmarks.description: Primary entry point for Sandip University Madhubani campus. Security cabin with 24-hour guard and visitor registration.

landmarks.name: Central Cafeteria
landmarks.description: Food court with student dining, quick snacks, and beverages.

landmarks.name: Library Plaza
landmarks.description: Outdoor seating and reading zone near the library.

landmarks.name: Medical Assistance Room
landmarks.description: Campus first-aid and emergency health support room.

landmarks.name: Indoor Sports Hall
landmarks.description: Badminton and table tennis facilities for students.

landmarks.name: University Shuttle Stop
landmarks.description: Boarding point for city connector and hostel shuttle.

landmarks.name: CSE Block Entrance
landmarks.description: Main entry gate of Computer Science Department Block.
